reference: AND HE ANSWERED I AM THE CHAMBERLAIN OF THE EMIR OF DAMASCUS KING SHARRKAN SON OF OMAR BIN AL NU'UMAN LORD OF BAGHDAD AND OF THE LAND OF KHORASAN AND I BRING TRIBUTE AND PRESENTS FROM HIM TO HIS FATHER IN BAGHDAD
text: and he answered i am the chamberlain of the emir of damascus king sharkan son of omar bin al-nu'man lord of bagdad and of the land of khorasan and i bring tribute and presents from him to his father in bagdad
